title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXBrick, including gameplay, BarkinMad Coins, achievements, leaderboards, and the ZX Series.
summary: Quick answers to the questions players ask most often about ZXBrick.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Looking for a quick answer? This page covers some of the most common questions about ZXBrick.
If you can't find what you're looking for here, explore the guides for more detailed information about gameplay, achievements, and progression.

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the ZX Series, sharing BarkinMad Coins, achievements, and progression with other supported ZX Series games.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick include BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. You can earn BarkinMad Coins while playing ZXBrick and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.

faq.question: What achievements are available?
faq.answer: ZXBrick includes achievements for playing games and destroying bricks. Visit the Achievements page to see the complete list and track your progress.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick support leaderboards?
faq.answer: Yes. Game Center leaderboards let you compete for the highest score and compare your performance with other players.

featureShowcases.heading: Quick Answers When You Need Them
featureShowcases.summary: Find answers to common ZXBrick questions without searching through every guide.
body: Whether you're learning the basics, exploring BarkinMad Coins, or checking how achievements and leaderboards work, this page provides quick answers to the questions players ask most often.
For more detailed information, each answer links to the relevant guide so you can continue exploring the game.
bullets: Easy links to more detailed guides.
Helpful for both new and returning players.

image.caption: Quick answers to help you get the most from ZXBrick.
